audit.description: Run the deterministic catalog (49 rules), human-readable findings.

lint.description: Same scan as audit, JSON output for piping to another tool or back to the model.

critique.description: Print an LLM-critique prompt for the 20 higher-level rules regex can't catch.

rules.description: List every rule with id, severity, description. --json for machine output.

skills.description: Install or refresh the pilcrow skill in your AI harness directories.

polish.description: Final pre-ship lens. Scores the piece on nine dimensions (0–4 each, 0–36 total) plus a verdict, then triages findings into ship-blockers (P0), worth-fixing (P1–P2), and taste-calls (P3).

humanize.description: Strip AI tells from prose while preserving voice. Classifies findings into vocabulary, cadence, template, fossil.

tighten.description: Cut zombie nouns and weak verbs. Per-sentence rewrites that surface the buried action, anchored in Williams' Style.

clarify.description: Reduce the reader's working-memory load. Per-passage rewrites with mental-model commentary, anchored in Pinker and Orwell.

pace.description: Restore sentence-length and paragraph rhythm. Emits a cadence histogram, an aural diagnostic, and split/merge proposals.

lead.description: Sharpen the opening. Finds the buried lede and proposes three alternative first sentences with different angles.

verify.description: Surface load-bearing claims and check whether each carries a citation, a specific number, or a checkable date. Classifies findings as unsupported / vague / hedged / unchecked.

aloud.description: Play the prose back via OpenAI TTS in an interactive session. Modes: walkthrough, full, targeted, compare. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.

argue.description: Map the piece's argument structure and stress-test it. Four phases: confirm the thesis (multi-choice), map supports/objections/premises, generate the strongest counter, check coverage.

teach.description: Interview the writer to create or refine VOICE.md (genre, audience, stance, method, signatures, taboos). Confirm open questions left by document; lock recurring moves as signatures or taboos.

document.description: Scan the writer's existing prose. Compute stylometric features and surface recurring moves (phrases, cadences, structural habits, punctuation tics). Writes a draft VOICE.md with citations and open questions for the writer to refine via teach.

craft.description: Method-aware end-to-end essay writing. Picks outliner / discovery / iterative / model-drafter at start; runs the matching flow with critique and polish gates.
